mosinstall.name: Cpanel_Mail
mosinstall.author: Joomla!Minas
mosinstall.description: This is a simple module that allows to connect in e-mails of the Cpanel: Horde, SquirrelMail, RoundCube.

param.name: domain
param.label: Domains
param.description: If its domain will be different of $mosConfig_live_site then fills this param

param.name: port
param.label: Port
param.description: If its port will be different of 2095 then fills this param
